stemHtml: OAL 126 just departed Bern. Smoke on the flight deck from an increasing electrical fire. What should the pilot report?

options.a: PAN PAN x3, Bern Tower OAL126, electrical fire, request to land immediately.
options.b: PAN PAN x3, Bern Tower OAL126, electrical fire, request vectors for downwind.
options.c: MAYDAY x3, Bern Tower OAL126, electrical fire, request vectors for downwind to land immediately.
options.d: MAYDAY x3, Bern Tower OAL126, request vectors to land immediately.
